Combine Red wine, sugar, bay leaf, thyme, rosemary and vinegar to a small sauce pot and reduce by half over low heat
Once reduced, remove from heat and season with salt.
Preheat the plancha over medium-high heat, then season with canola oil
Sear cipollini onions on plancha, cut side down, to a nice caramelization.  Flip and repeat.  Use extra oil as necessary.
Reserve seared onions to 200 Hotel Pan in a even layer, cover with red wine reduction.
Add the tabs of butter sporadically around the onions
In a preheated convection oven set to ~400°F low fan, braise uncovered for ~35 minutes or until tender but al dente
Remove from oven and cool to room temp, then cool in blast chiller.
Remove onions from braising liquid and reserve on resting racks over sheet trays in speed rack, uncovered for ~12 hours
After ~12 hours, cover sheet trays to prevent excessive drying.
